description: §48.2.1 clean neg — the valid inline-lambda form `arr.map(n => n * 2)` (a plain arrow, no `fn` keyword) SHALL NOT fire E-FN-ARROW-BODY. Confirms the detector keys on the mixed `fn(args) => expr` shape only, never on an ordinary arrow. `notCodes` asserts E-FN-ARROW-BODY stays silent.
rationale: §48.2.1: `args => expr` is one of the two sanctioned anonymous-callable forms (the plain inline lambda). Only the mixed `fn(args) => expr` is rejected; a bare arrow compiles clean.
